target: 11. Final Ferry

We are repeating this announcement.
A disaster of unknown cause has occurred
centered around the Hitogashima Shrine.

Residents wishing to evacuate to the mainland
should board the temporary ferry departing shortly.

Look, Shinpei!
The ferry's already arrived at the harbor!

But there's no one around at all…
Even with all these announcements.

…Where's Dad?
He probably boarded the ferry first.

Hey, Mio.
Don't you find it strange there's no one else around?

They've probably already boarded the ferry.
I'm sure Tokiko and Sou are on it too.
Come on, let's get on the ferry!
Mio, wait!
Huh? Why?

I'll go first just in case.
Follow me later.

(Something's wrong…
No presence at all)

(What's going on?
No one's on the ferry?)
(Th-there's someone collapsed!?)
Are you okay…?

…What… is this?
H-hello…?
Why is Mio here…?

(If that's the case…
Then where's the Mio who's been with me all this time?)

I'm glad we met, Shinpei.
The real me.
A shadow!!
Guh…!?

Dad's knife cuts well.
It's well-maintained.
When… did you switch…?

When do you think?
Just think like usual, Shinpei.

I… something's wrong…
That can't be real…
But you're… wearing a yukata…!

(The shadow Mio I saw earlier was in a uniform.
That's why I could tell it apart…)

(Sou asked Tokiko to help me with the kimono…
That's why I was wearing it…)
(A shadow copying Mio would have to have seen her in a kimono…)
Oh…!
Brother, were you a fan of that person?

No, I'm not really a fan, but since it's a chance…
I thought I'd take a photo.
Whoa, it's bright…!

Really.
The camera flashes have been intense since earlier.
That person must be really popular.
(That's when it happened…)
You copied Mio's yukata outfit during the festival!

That's right.
I should thank Kaori.

It's not just copying…
You took Mio's place!?

Huh, me?
What are you talking about, Shinpei?
We've been together all along.

You know, if your blood pressure gets this high,
even you wouldn't be able to think straight.

(That's right, this shadow was with me.
Then who took Mio's place…)
…U-uh.
(No good… I can't stand…)

Are you reaching your limit?
Shall I make it easier for you?
(This feeling… like this…)
Stop it.
Don't finish it yet.
(That's the shadow me…?)
(Curses… was it that guy from before…?)
…Ah…

Dad and Mom said…
"Be quiet."
Anyway, I'll ask you…
…Well, it's fine.

You don't have to answer…
I'll ask later.

(The shadow… it's the same as Totsumura's…
Who took over…)
(Same as Totsumura… a shadow just like me…)

(I've been infected with the Shadow Sickness…
No… I've had it all along!
From the beginning!!)
(This one took Mio…)

I told you.
This one can go back in time and redo things.

I don't know the details,
but it's definitely triggered by death.
Have you forgotten why you were made the observer?

I haven't forgotten.
But they looked so painful.

Well then.
Let's go.

Sorry, Shinpei.
I was told to "keep an eye on her" while I was playing.

Didn't I look just like Mio?
It was pretty fun.

Bye, Shinpei.
By the time you die, everything will be over.
Guh… ahh…
("Everything will be over"… What does that mean?)
No… rather, Mio…
Mio, stay strong…
Mio…!!
Ugh… damn it…!!
